Test_Objective: Verify modal opens when user clicks the trigger element
Precondition: User is on the parent page containing the Add link trigger
Steps: 1. Click the "Add link" button/link on the parent page
Expected_Result: Modal "Them duong dan" is displayed centered on screen with dimmed background overlay. All fields are empty by default.

Test_Objective: Verify modal opens correctly on double-click without duplicate modals
Precondition: User is on the parent page containing the Add link trigger
Steps: 1. Double-click the "Add link" button/link on the parent page
Expected_Result: Only one modal instance is displayed. No duplicate modals appear.

Test_Objective: Verify modal can be opened via keyboard navigation
Precondition: User is on the parent page containing the Add link trigger
Steps:
1. Press Tab to navigate focus to the "Add link" trigger
2. Press Enter
Expected_Result: Modal "Them duong dan" is displayed correctly.

Test_Objective: Verify modal closes when Cancel (Huy) button is clicked
Steps: 1. Click the "Huy" (Cancel) button
Expected_Result: Modal is closed. No data is saved. Parent page returns to previous state.

Test_Objective: Verify modal closes when ESC key is pressed
Steps: 1. Press the ESC key
Expected_Result: Modal is closed without saving any data.

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when clicking outside the modal area
Steps: 1. Click on the dimmed background area outside the modal
Expected_Result: Modal is closed (or remains open based on spec). No data is saved if closed.

Test_Objective: Verify that background elements are not interactive while modal is displayed
Steps: 1. Try to click on various elements on the parent page behind the modal overlay
Expected_Result: No interaction occurs with background elements. Modal remains displayed.

Test_Objective: Verify modal is displayed centered with dimmed background overlay
Steps:
1. Open the "Add link" modal
2. Observe position and background
Expected_Result: Modal is centered on the screen. Background is dimmed/covered with overlay.

Test_Objective: Verify title "Them duong dan" is displayed correctly
Steps: 1. Observe the title area at top of modal
Expected_Result: Title "Them duong dan" (Add link) is displayed in bold, dark text, top-left aligned within the modal.

Test_Objective: Verify label "Noi dung" is displayed correctly for the Text input
Steps: 1. Observe the first input field area
Expected_Result: Label "Noi dung" is displayed to the left of the text input box.

Test_Objective: Verify the Text input box displays correctly
Steps: 1. Observe the Text input box
Expected_Result: Input box is displayed with white background, thin border, rounded corners, approximately 610x56px. Field is empty by default.

Test_Objective: Verify label "URL" is displayed correctly for the Link input
Steps: 1. Observe the second input field area
Expected_Result: Label "URL" is displayed to the left of the link input box.

Test_Objective: Verify the Link/URL input box displays correctly
Steps: 1. Observe the Link input box
Expected_Result: Input box is displayed with white background, thin border, rounded corners, approximately 609x56px. Field is empty by default.

Test_Objective: Verify Cancel (Huy) button displays correctly
Steps: 1. Observe the Cancel button at bottom-left of modal
Expected_Result: Button displays text "Huy" with "X" icon. Small size, outlined/bordered style.

Test_Objective: Verify Save (Luu) button displays correctly
Steps: 1. Observe the Save button at bottom-right of modal
Expected_Result: Button displays text "Luu" with link icon. Large size, yellow background.

Test_Objective: Verify Text input shows focus highlight when focused
Steps: 1. Click into the Text input box
Expected_Result: Input box shows a highlighted border (focus ring) indicating it is active.

Test_Objective: Verify Link input shows focus highlight when focused
Steps: 1. Click into the Link/URL input box
Expected_Result: Input box shows a highlighted border (focus ring) indicating it is active.

Test_Objective: Verify error message displays correctly when Text field validation fails
Steps:
1. Leave Text field empty
2. Click Save (Luu)
Expected_Result: Error message is displayed near the Text field with correct format, position, and styling.

Test_Objective: Verify error message displays correctly when Link field validation fails
Steps:
1. Leave Link field empty
2. Click Save (Luu)
Expected_Result: Error message is displayed near the Link field with correct format, position, and styling.

Test_Objective: Verify modal displays correctly when browser is zoomed
Steps:
1. Zoom browser to 150%
2. Observe modal layout
3. Zoom browser to 75%
4. Observe modal layout
Expected_Result: Modal layout is not broken. All elements remain visible and usable at different zoom levels.

Test_Objective: Verify modal is responsive across different viewport sizes
Steps:
1. View modal at 320px width (mobile)
2. View at 768px (tablet)
3. View at 1024px (desktop)
4. View at 1440px (wide)
Expected_Result: Modal adjusts appropriately for each breakpoint. No overflow or cut-off elements. Touch targets >= 44x44px on mobile.

Test_Objective: Verify correct tab order among focusable elements
Steps: 1. Press Tab repeatedly to cycle through elements
Expected_Result: Focus moves in order: Text input -> Link input -> Cancel button -> Save button. Focus stays within the modal (focus trap).

Test_Objective: Verify modal remains visible when background page has scrollable content
Precondition: Modal is open, parent page has scrollable content
Steps: 1. Attempt to scroll the page while modal is open
Expected_Result: Modal remains centered and fully visible. Background scroll is prevented or modal stays in position.

2. Enter valid URL in Link field
3. Click Save
Expected_Result: Data saved successfully. Modal closes.

Steps:

Steps:

2. Enter "example.com" in Link field
3. Blur Link field
4. Click Save
Expected_Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid URL format.

Steps:

2. Enter "not a url at all" in Link field
3. Click Save
Expected_Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid URL format.

Steps:
1. Enter valid text in Text field
2. Enter 2049-char URL in Link field
3. Click Save
Expected_Result: Input truncated or error message displayed.

Test_Objective: Verify error when URL is below minimum length (4 chars)
Steps:
1. Enter valid text in Text field
2. Enter "http" in Link field
3. Click Save
Expected_Result: Error message displayed.

Test_Objective: Verify URL validation triggers on field blur
Steps:
1. Enter "invalid-url" in Link field
2. Click into Text field (blur Link field)
Expected_Result: Error message displayed immediately on blur.

Test_Objective: Verify successful save with valid Text and Link values
Steps:
1. Enter "My Link" in Text field
2. Enter "https://example.com" in Link field
3. Click Save (Luu)
Expected_Result: Data saved successfully. Modal closes. Link added to parent page/component.

Test_Objective: Verify errors when both fields are empty
Steps:
1. Leave both fields empty
2. Click Save (Luu)
Expected_Result: Error messages displayed for both fields. Modal remains open.

Test_Objective: Verify no duplicate submission on double-click Save
Precondition: Modal is open with valid data
Steps:
1. Enter valid data in both fields
2. Double-click the Save (Luu) button
Expected_Result: Only one link saved. No duplicate entries created.

Test_Objective: Verify Save can be triggered via keyboard (Tab + Enter)
Precondition: Modal is open with valid data
Steps:
1. Enter valid data in both fields
2. Press Tab to focus Save button
3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: Data saved successfully. Modal closes.

Test_Objective: Verify Cancel discards entered data
Steps:
1. Enter "Some text" in Text field
2. Enter "https://example.com" in Link field
3. Click Cancel (Huy)
Expected_Result: Modal closes. No data saved. Entered data is discarded.

Test_Objective: Verify Cancel works when fields are empty
Steps: 1. Click Cancel (Huy) without entering any data
Expected_Result: Modal closes without error.

Test_Objective: Verify no error on double-clicking Cancel
Steps: 1. Double-click the Cancel (Huy) button
Expected_Result: Modal closes normally. No error occurs.

Test_Objective: Verify SQL injection handled safely in Text field
Steps:
1. Enter "'; DROP TABLE users; --" in Text field
2. Enter valid URL in Link field
3. Click Save
Expected_Result: Input treated as plain text. No SQL execution. Data saved safely or rejected.

Test_Objective: Verify XSS prevention in Text field
Steps:
1. Enter "<script>alert('XSS')</script>" in Text field
2. Enter valid URL in Link field
3. Click Save
Expected_Result: Input sanitized. No script execution. Content escaped or rejected.

Test_Objective: Verify JavaScript protocol URLs are rejected in Link field
Steps:
1. Enter valid text in Text field
2. Enter "javascript:alert('XSS')" in Link field
3. Click Save
Expected_Result: URL rejected as invalid format. Only http/https protocols accepted.

Test_Objective: Verify correct tab order and focus trap within modal
Steps: 1. Press Tab repeatedly from the first focusable element
Expected_Result: Focus moves: Text input -> Link input -> Cancel button -> Save button -> loops back. Focus remains trapped within modal.

Test_Objective: Verify copy/paste works correctly in input fields
Steps:
1. Copy a URL to clipboard
2. Click into the Link field
3. Press Ctrl+V (Cmd+V on Mac)
Expected_Result: Text pasted correctly into the field.

Test_Objective: Verify behavior when page is reloaded with modal open
Precondition: Modal is open with data entered
Steps:
1. Enter data in both fields
2. Reload the page (F5 or Ctrl+R)
Expected_Result: Modal closes. Entered data is lost. Page returns to default state.
